source_policy: All final requirements must be verified against official tender document/ad and approved evaluation template.

requirements.requirement: Identify official tender title, tender number, agency, closing date and tender category.
requirements.evidence_needed: Official tender advertisement or tender document

requirements.requirement: Confirm required contractor grade, categories and specializations such as CIDB G7 and relevant CE codes where applicable.
Confirm Bumiputera / STB / Sabah route requirements where tender requires them.
requirements.evidence_needed: STB / PUKONSA / Bumiputera certificate as applicable

requirements.requirement: Check tender completeness using approved evaluation template, including required forms, signatures, stamping, authority and returned documents.
requirements.evidence_needed: Borang 1 and Borang 5 mapping from ANALISA KESEMPURNAAN DAN KEPATUHAN TENDER

requirements.requirement: Evaluate company financial capacity using audit, nett worth, modal pusingan, bank/facility and current workload.
requirements.evidence_needed: Audited account, bank statement, facility letter, current workload

requirements.requirement: Match company work experience against tender scope and evaluation template.
requirements.evidence_needed: LOA, SST, CPC and project completion/current project records

requirements.requirement: Evaluate technical staff, qualifications, equipment and capability evidence.
requirements.evidence_needed: Staff list, qualifications, equipment/plant records, method/programme where required

requirements.requirement: Run price/cut-off/BOQ analysis only as commercial support branch after company compliance context exists.
requirements.evidence_needed: Cut-off sheet, BOQ/company price folder, comparison sheet

decision_rule: No company recommendation is allowed from this matrix alone. It feeds Mandatory Compliance Agent and Company Scoring Agent.
